product_overview: sketch-to-plan is a web application that converts user-drawn architectural sketches into professional CAD-style 2D floor plans using Google Gemini AI. It provides a multi-layer canvas, a two-step AI pipeline (sketch analysis + image generation), and hybrid authentication (BYOK + server proxy) for flexible deployment.
core_goals: Accurately preserve sketch topology (room positions and adjacencies) in generated floor plans
Produce visually consistent, minimalist CAD-style output that strictly follows the reference template
Provide an intuitive multi-layer canvas with undo/redo and shape/text tools for quick sketching
Support hybrid authentication: BYOK (local key) and Server Proxy (server-side key) with automatic mode selection
Offer robust serverless proxy endpoints and local dev support with fallback models for reliability
Store generated results in a browsable library with timestamps and metadata

features.name: Sketch Input & Canvas
features.description: Multi-layer drawing canvas (pen, eraser, rectangle, text, move) that exports the current sketch as an image for AI processing. Includes layer visibility/opacity, undo/redo, grid overlay and shape editing.
user_flows: POST /api/generate/analysis with model='gemini-2.5-pro' and contents=[{type:'image_base64', data:'<exported_canvas>'}] -> Receive 200 with structured analysis (OCR, rooms, spatial drivers) -> POST /api/generate/image with model='gemini-2.5-flash-image' and contents including the analysis reference -> Receive 200 with generated_image (base64) and style metadata

POST /api/generate/analysis with model='gemini-2.5-pro' and contents=[{type:'image_base64', data:'<exported_canvas>'}] -> Receive 503 No API key configured (error) -> User is prompted to enter API key or switch to proxy mode (UI action)

features.name: AI Analysis Pipeline (Sketch Analysis)
features.description: Step 1: Analyze the sketch with a generative model to extract OCR, room labels, bounding boxes and a small structured spatial analysis used as the driver for final image generation. Supports primary and fallback models.
user_flows: POST /api/generate/analysis with model='gemini-2.5-pro' and contents=[{type:'image_base64', data:'<exported_canvas>'}] -> Receive 200 with analysis object (text OCR, room list, adjacency graph, structural driver strings)

POST /api/generate/analysis with model='gemini-2.5-pro' and contents=[{...}] -> Receive 500 Execution error -> POST /api/generate/analysis with model='gemini-2.5' and same contents -> Receive 200 with analysis object (fallback success)

features.name: Plan Image Generation
features.description: Step 2: Generate the CAD-style floor plan image from the structural analysis. Prompts enforce strict topology and template style instructions; supports fallback image models.
user_flows: POST /api/generate/image with model='gemini-2.5-flash-image' and contents=[{role:'system', text:'<generationPrompt with CRITICAL TOPOLOGY INSTRUCTION>'}, {role:'user', image:'<canvas>'}, {role:'assistant', analysis:'<analysis_object>'}] -> Receive 200 with generated_image (base64 PNG) and style metadata

POST /api/generate/image with model='gemini-2.5-flash-image' and contents=[...] -> Receive 500 Execution error -> POST /api/generate/image with model='gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview' and same contents -> Receive 200 with generated_image (fallback success)

features.name: Hybrid Authentication (BYOK + Server Proxy)
features.description: Detects and switches between BYOK (user-supplied Gemini key stored in localStorage or build-time key) and Server Proxy (server-side key via serverless endpoints). Exposes UI to add/remove a personal key.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 {ok:true, hasKey:false} -> Instantiate GoogleGenAI SDK locally with user-supplied key (BYOK) and call models.generateContent for analysis -> Receive 200 with analysis (SDK direct call, BYOK happy path)

GET /api/health -> Receive 200 {ok:true, hasKey:false} -> POST /api/generate/analysis (server proxy) -> Receive 503 No API key configured -> UI shows error and prompts user to input a personal API key (error flow)

features.name: Unified Proxy & Local Development (serverless / express)
features.description: A unified proxy endpoint for local development and Vercel serverless functions that forwards requests to the Gemini SDK using the server-side API key when BYOK is unavailable.
user_flows: POST /api/generate with model='gemini-2.5-pro' and contents=[...] -> Receive 200 with result (Gemini SDK result object) (unified proxy happy path)

POST /api/generate with model='gemini-2.5-pro' and contents=[...] -> Receive 405 Method Not Allowed OR Receive 503 No API key configured -> Developer falls back to local express server or provides GEMINI_API_KEY in environment (error flow)

features.name: Health Check & Key Detection
features.description: Single GET endpoint that returns service health and whether a server-side Gemini key is configured. Used by the UI to decide auth mode and to display key-related prompts.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 {ok:true, hasKey:true} -> UI selects proxy mode automatically or indicates server key available (happy path)
GET /api/health -> Receive 200 {ok:true, hasKey:false} -> UI selects BYOK or prompts user to add a key if none is available (error/fallback flow)

features.name: Library & Result Display
features.description: Store, timestamp and display generated floor plans in an in-app library for browsing and re-use. Display includes the generated image and the analysis metadata (rooms, structure) alongside timestamps and export options.
user_flows: POST /api/generate/image with model='gemini-2.5-flash-image' and contents=[...] -> Receive 200 with generated_image (base64) -> POST /api/library with body={imageBase64:'<data>', analysis:'<analysis_object>', timestamp:'<ts>'} -> Receive 201 Saved (happy path; planned library endpoint)

POST /api/generate/image with model='gemini-2.5-flash-image' and contents=[...] -> Receive 500 Execution error -> Do NOT call POST /api/library; UI shows generation failure and does not save to library (error flow)

project.name: sketch-to-plan
project.description: Convert architectural sketches into professional CAD-style floor plans using Google Gemini AI

features.name: Sketch Input & Canvas
features.description: Multi-layer drawing system with pen, eraser, rectangle, text, and move tools
details: Layer management with visibility and opacity control

features.name: AI Analysis Pipeline
features.description: Two-step AI pipeline converting sketch to floor plan
details: Step 1 - Sketch Analysis via gemini-2.5-pro (OCR + 5-step spatial analysis)
Step 2 - Plan Image Generation via gemini-2.5-flash-image

features.name: Hybrid Authentication
features.description: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) + Server Proxy modes
details: Personal Gemini API key stored in localStorage
Auto mode detection based on key availability

features.name: Library
features.description: Store and display generated floor plans with timestamps

features.name: Result Display
features.description: Show generated CAD-style floor plan image with analysis data

api_endpoints.description: Plan image generation using Gemini AI
Unified Gemini proxy for local development (Express)

key_files.purpose: Main application component (canvas, layers, generation logic)
Vercel serverless function for sketch analysis
Vercel serverless function for image generation

data_flow: Step 2 - Plan Image Generation (CAD floor plan)
Display result and save to library

known_issues: Room position mismatches between input sketch and output (topology preservation)
Visual style inconsistencies in generated floor plans
